text:
SS16 review notes:

- stage is dry at SS Start 
- light drizzle at 6,7 with no effect on road
- light drizzle at 7,7 with no effect on road so far, continues until 9,0
- from 9,0 drizzle gets stronger, light rain from 9,4
- from 9,4 road is damp with light increasing dampness 
- light rain from 10,5
- few wet spots between 11,8 and 12,5
- wet from 13,1 to finish
testing new card layout for videos
